creator: botihim321@telvetto.com
text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #4)
Thank you for your reply! Yes I did try to contact to the author through electronic mail, but I didn't got any response yet. It's been 3 days since I emailed him. I'm guessing that he has quite "abandoned" it (last release was years ago). :(

> What are your plans for this port?
Mainly to fix some compiler warnings/bugs and keep it still available. I discovered this game a few months ago in FreeBSD ports, and I liked it. Sometimes I play it inside Emacs vterm. As it doesn't have serious dependencies (for a terminal application prospective), I quite like it. :)
